name: Naikai Zosen Corporation
summary: Naikai Zosen Corporation engages in shipbuilding business in Japan. The company constructs ferries for trasnport, container ships, product tankers, bulk carriers, general cargo ships, car carriers, refrigerated carriers, ro-ro ships, survey ships, research vessels, investigation and control ships, LPG/LNG tankers, chemical tankers, etc. It is also involved in the repair and remodeling of ships and governmental vessels. Naikai Zosen Corporation was founded in 1940 and is headquartered in Onomichi, Japan.
